title: Deleted Files
description: Everything seems perfect! But it's like something is watching and following you around! This is a very cool Minecraft mod that will definitely provide fun for everyone!
body:
## You enter the world and what a beautiful sight you see! But something is watching you from afar, you get closer but there is nothing there! Were your eyes just dazzled or was there really something there?

Deleted Files is a new horror mod that has a lot of features(developments are coming one after another)!
**-create files (in the desktop and the download folders)**

### **-do jumpscares**

### **-custom horror mobs**

### **-can read the names of files and folders**

### **-can read the machine's username**

### **,can see ip adress,operation system, minecraft username**

Attention!:The mod will receive updates during updates that will allow you to create files on the pc! But don't be afraid as this will not harm your computer, it will just create a text file on your DESKTOP.

Works with single and multiplayer too (different endings)!

Also avabile on curseforge: [CLICK HERE](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/deleted-files)

# **Do not download the mod from unsafe websites (that I have not linked to here or elsewhere)!**

I hope you enjoy the game and tell others about it with pleasant experiences!
